_note: R214 — σf 물리상한(family endurance ratio) 보정. fatigue/UTS 가 family 물리 ceiling 초과한 43 엔트리를 per-entry 조사(워크플로 wd79klfqt)로 교정. 근본원인: hardened/peak baseline 이 soft 조건 UTS 에 오적용 · cold-work multiplier overshoot · Cu/Al family ratio 초과 · cast defect-limited · elevated-temp. value=교정 σf(MPa), ratio=σf/UTS, tier=신뢰도(high 직접근거·med/low 물리추정).
_sources: Shigley Se≈0.5·UTS(steel<1400MPa) · ASM Vol.1/19 fatigue · MMPDS · Aluminum Association 5e8-cycle · NASA NTRS(GRCop) · repo copper-alloys-general.md(~UTS/3) · Haynes 282 datasheet · Donachie Titanium · APWORKS/Scalmalloy 문헌.

overrides.name: H11 — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.basis: soft mill-annealed; 576 은 hardened H11 baseline 오적용 (Shigley 0.5·UTS)

overrides.name: AISI 440C — As-supplied (Wrought)
overrides.basis: annealed martensitic SS ~0.45-0.5·UTS; 500 은 hardened baseline

overrides.name: Maraging C350 (VascoMax, 18Ni-9Co) — Solution annealed 815°C AC (soft 30-35 HRC, formable)
overrides.basis: maraging 저 endurance ratio; 700 은 aged 값 soft 조건 오적용

overrides.name: AISI 440C — Strain-hardened (Wrought)
overrides.basis: soft martensitic SS; 460 은 hardened temper

overrides.name: SAE 21-4N (NCF3) — automotive exhaust valve — Solution + Aged, tested at 700°C (hot strength)
overrides.basis: 700°C hot 조건 일관 (UTS 510 도 700°C 값); austenitic ~0.45·UTS

overrides.name: AA 2011 — Annealed (Wrought)
overrides.basis: annealed 2xxx ~0.38·UTS; 125 는 T3 5e8 값 O-temper 오적용

overrides.name: Scalmalloy — As-built
overrides.basis: AM as-built 표면지배; AlMgSc-SLM 문헌 80-110MPa (R216: as-built UTS 375)

overrides.name: Scalmalloy — Stress-relieved
overrides.basis: aged(325°C/4h=SR) machined AlMgSc ~150-165MPa; R216 강화상태 UTS 520

overrides.name: Tantalum (Pure) — Wrought, Annealed
overrides.basis: soft BCC refractory ~0.45·UTS; fixed 180 baseline 오적용 (sparse data)

overrides.name: Haynes 282 — Solution + Aged, tested at 760°C (1400°F service)
overrides.basis: 760°C 서비스 조건; aged Ni 고온 ~0.5·UTS (datasheet 인장 확인)

overrides.name: Ti-15-3-3-3 (β-Ti) — Solution-treated (β-quenched)
overrides.basis: soft β-Ti unaged ~0.5·UTS; 580 은 aged 값 오적용

overrides.name: Ti-6Al-4V Grade 23 ELI (UNS R56401) — STA — Solution 904-954°C WQ + Aged 538°C 4h AC
